responsibilities: Lead client engagements to diagnose business problems and develop data-driven strategic and operational recommendations
Structure complex business problems into testable hypotheses and design analytical approaches to validate them
Build financial and operational models to quantify the impact of proposed strategic initiatives on client performance
Facilitate executive workshops and steering committee meetings to align client leadership on strategic direction and priorities
Manage cross-functional project teams, coordinating analysts and subject matter experts to deliver engagement milestones
Develop and present compelling findings and recommendations to C-suite executives in client-ready presentations
Design implementation roadmaps and change management plans to drive client adoption of recommended initiatives
Cultivate long-term client relationships, identifying opportunities for follow-on engagements and expanded scope of work
